linting.notes: No Python linting tools configured in pyproject.toml files. Rustfmt check found formatting violations in launcher/src/main.rs and router/src/main.rs. Clippy is available but not validated due to missing protobuf generated files in validation environment.

testing.framework: pytest (Python), cargo test (Rust - no tests found)
testing.notes: 35 Python unit tests pass successfully. Integration tests require a running text-generation-server with a loaded model, making them infrastructure-dependent. No Rust unit tests found in router or launcher components.

gating_checks.name: Build Docker image (server-release)
gating_checks.command: docker build --target=server-release --build-arg GIT_COMMIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse HEAD) -t text-gen-server .

ci.notes: All CI checks run on pull_request and push to main. Both python-tests and integration-tests run inside a Docker container (cpu-tests stage). The build workflow builds and pushes container images to quay.io/wxpe/text-gen-server.

build.build_command: docker build --target=server-release -t text-gen-server . (or) cargo install --path router (or) cd server && make install
build.notes: Multi-language project with complex build. Rust components (router, launcher) are built separately. Python server requires protobuf generation, PyTorch installation, and Poetry dependencies. Production build uses multi-stage Dockerfile.

conventions.test_naming: Python: test_* functions, pytest style. Rust: #[test] annotations (none found)
conventions.import_style: Python: standard imports. Rust: configured for group_imports = StdExternalCrate, imports_granularity = Crate (requires nightly)
conventions.notes: Project uses Poetry for Python dependency management. Rust uses workspace with members: router, router/client, launcher. Protobuf files are generated during build.

lint_commands.notes: Found formatting violations in launcher/src/main.rs and router/src/main.rs. Requires Rust toolchain 1.77.2. Some rustfmt features require nightly channel.

test_commands.notes: All 35 Python unit tests passed successfully in 24.04s
Integration tests require a running text-generation-server with a loaded model. Cannot be validated without infrastructure.

container_recipe.notes: The server requires editable install (pip install -e) for protobuf imports to work correctly. PyTorch CPU version is sufficient for unit tests. Integration tests would require GPU support and model downloads.

results.notes: Installation successful. Protobuf generation and all Python dependencies installed correctly.

results.notes: Rustfmt found formatting violations. Also warns about unstable features (imports_granularity, group_imports) requiring nightly channel. Errors about missing pb.rs files expected (generated during build).
All Python unit tests passed. Tests cover logit processors, prompt cache functionality, and utility conversions.

validation.summary: Install OK, lint FAIL (rustfmt violations), Python tests OK (35 passed), integration tests not validated (require infrastructure)
